payloads.text:
🔒 Exec approval required ID: a6960397-f593-43a6-9078-28c26df9de8e Command: ``` cd /Users/Jack/.openclaw/workspace/agents/joy && node /Users/Jack/.openclaw/workspace/skills/agentmail-mail/scripts/mail-client.js send --inbox_id jaketribe_bot@agentmail.to --to jason@hansen.com --subject "Project Template: Equipment Downtime Tracker" --text "Hi Jason, Here is the Equipment Downtime Tracking System project template you requested. Best, Joy" --html "

Hi Jason,

Here is the Equipment Downtime Tracking System project template you requested:

# Equipment Downtime Tracking System
# Complete Project Template
# Generated: 2026-04-10
# Project: Lineage Connect Equipment Downtime Tracker

project:
  name: equipment-downtime-tracker
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Real-time equipment downtime tracking system for production floor management
  company: Lineage Connect
  
  approach:
    - iterative_development: true
    - quality_over_speed: true
    - fully_baked_solution: true
    - no_hard_deadline: true

architecture:
  type: multi_tenant_hierarchical
  
  hierarchy:
    levels:
      - company:
          description: Top-level organization (supports multiple companies)
          can_create: [admin]
      - building:
          description: Physical building location
          can_create: [admin]
      - floor:
          description: Floor within building
          can_create: [admin]
      - zone:
          description: Equipment zone (printer_zone, inserter_zone, jet_zone)
          can_create: [admin]
      - equipment:
          description: Physical equipment unit
          can_create: [admin]
          has_parent: zone
      - module:
          description: Sub-component of equipment
          can_create: [technician, admin]
          has_parent: equipment
      - component:
          description: Individual component within module
          can_create: [technician, admin]
          has_parent: module

  deployment:
    strategy: containerized
    options:
      - on_premise: supported
      - cloud: supported
      - migration_path: seamless
    
  stack:
    frontend:
      framework: React/Next.js
      features:
        - responsive_design: true
        - interactive_floor_map: true
        - real_time_updates: true
        - drag_and_drop: true
    
    backend:
      framework: Node.js
      api_type: RESTful
      authentication:
        phase1: email_password
        phase2: microsoft_entra_id_sso
    
    database:
      type: PostgreSQL
      features:
        - relational_data: true
        - jsonb_for_flexibility: true
        - audit_trail: true
    
    file_storage:
      type: MinIO/S3_compatible
      stores:
        - floor_maps
        - equipment_photos
        - operator_attachments

roles:
  administrator:
    permissions:
      - full_crud: all_entities
      - user_management: true
      - company_building_floor_zone_creation: true
      - system_configuration: true
      - report_access: all
    
  supervisor:
    permissions:
      - view: all_entities
      - update: equipment_status
      - mark_equipment_operational: true
      - receive_escalations: true
      - report_access: all
      - export_reports: true
    
  technician:
    permissions:
      - acknowledge_repairs: true
      - log_work: true
      - update_status: true
      - add_modules: true
      - add_components: true
      - mark_equipment_operational: true
      - view_history: true
      - view_dashboard: true
    
  operator:
    permissions:
      - report_issues: true
      - view_status: true
      - view_history: true
      - attach_photos: true
      - log_self_resolved_errors: true

equipment:
  identification:
    format: custom_names_with_ids
    admin_controlled: true
    fields:
      - id: auto_generated
      - name: custom_admin_defined
      - description: optional
      - location: hierarchical_reference
      - photo: optional
  
  status:
    levels:
      - running:
          description: Equipment fully operational
          color: green
      - degraded:
          description: Equipment functioning with issues
          color: yellow
      - down:
          description: Equipment stopped, requires attention
          color: red
    
    rollup_logic: user_determined
    rules:
      - module_down_may_mean_equipment_degraded: true
      - not_automatic: technician_supervisor_decide

  lifecycle:
    creation: admin_only
    modules_components:
      creation: [technician, admin]
      on_the_fly: true

downtime_events:
  workflow:
    steps:
      - step1_report:
          actor: operator
          action: report_issue
          fields:
            - equipment_selection
            - severity: [critical, non_critical]
            - description
            - photo_attachment: optional
          result: equipment_status_updated
      
      - step2_notify:
          action: send_notifications
          recipients:
            - technician_pool
            - supervisor
          channels:
            - email
            - in_app
      
      - step3_acknowledge:
          actor: technician
          action: first_to_acknowledge_gets_assignment
          timer:
            escalation_minutes: 15
            escalation_recipient: manager
      
      - step4_repair:
          actor: assigned_technician
          actions:
            - log_work_performed
            - record_parts_used
            - track_time
            - add_notes
            - upload_photos: optional
      
      - step5_resolve:
          actor: [technician, supervisor]
          action: mark_equipment_operational
          result:
            - status_updated_to_running
            - audit_trail_complete

  non_critical_errors:
    description: Self-resolved issues logged for pattern tracking
    example: \"Printer communication error - reboot fixed\"
    logged_by: operator
    status_after: running
    purpose: trend_analysis

mobile_interface:
  type: responsive_web_app
  pwa: false
  reason: reliable_wifi_available
  
  features:
    - quick_equipment_selection:
        methods:
          - zone_list_filter
          - recent_equipment
          - search
    
    - fast_reporting:
        target_time_seconds: 30
        steps:
          - select_equipment
          - select_severity
          - add_description: optional
          - attach_photo: optional
          - submit
    
    - photo_attachment:
        use_case: capture_error_screens
        enabled: true
    
    - view_history:
        access: full
    
    - ui_optimizations:
        - large_touch_targets
        - minimal_forms
        - thumb_friendly

floor_map:
  views:
    - map_view:
        description: Visual floor plan with equipment positions
    - list_view:
        description: Tabular equipment list with status
    toggle: true
  
  features:
    - floor_plan_upload:
        actor: admin
        format: image
    
    - equipment_positioning:
        method: drag_and_drop
        storage: x_y_coordinates
        snap_to_grid: optional
    
    - equipment_representation:
        type: generic_icons
        status_indicators:
          - running: green
          - degraded: yellow
          - down: red
    
    - interaction:
        click_action: open_equipment_detail
        detail_includes: equipment_photo
    
    - navigation:
        - zoom
        - pan
        - mini_map: optional
    
    - multi_location_support:
        levels:
          - company
          - building
          - floor
          - zone

  locations:
    current:
      - main_building:
          floors: [floor_1, floor_2]
      - additional_building:
          floors: [floor_1]
    zones:
      - printer_zone
      - inserter_zone
      - jet_zone
      - finishing_zone

notifications:
  phase1_mvp:
    channels:
      - email:
          recipients: role_based
          events:
            - equipment_down
            - escalation
            - repair_complete
      - in_app:
          recipients: active_users
          type: real_time_updates
  
  phase2:
    channels:
      - microsoft_teams:
          integration: webhook
          channels: team_notifications
  
  phase3_future:
    channels:
      - sms:
          use_case: critical_escalations
          note: highest_cost_last_priority

  escalation:
    timer_minutes: 15
    condition: unacknowledged_downtime
    recipient: manager

parts_tracking:
  strategy: simple_catalog
  
  part_attributes:
    - name
    - part_number
    - cost: optional
    - description: optional
  
  usage:
    selection: dropdown_during_repair_log
    recorded_per_repair: true
  
  reporting:
    - cost_per_repair
    - cost_per_equipment
    - cost_per_time_period
    - parts_usage_frequency
  
  extensibility:
    future_enhancement: full_inventory_management
    current_design: supports_future_expansion

reporting:
  live_dashboard:
    features:
      - real_time_status_view
      - color_coded_indicators
      - filter_by:
          - location
          - zone
          - equipment_type
          - status
    
  executive_reports:
    time_periods: configurable
    reports:
      - mttr:
          description: Mean Time To Repair
      - mtbf:
          description: Mean Time Between Failures
      - downtime_by_equipment:
          description: Top offending equipment
      - downtime_by_module:
          description: Component failure patterns
      - technician_performance:
          description: Workload and resolution times
      - peak_failure_times:
          description: Shift pattern analysis
      - repair_cost_summary:
          description: Financial impact

authentication:
  phase1:
    type: email_password
    features:
      - user_management: admin_controlled
      - password_policies: standard
      - session_management: included
  
  phase2:
    type: microsoft_entra_id
    sso: true
    integration: active_directory

data_model:
  entities:
    Company:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - name: string
        - created_at: timestamp
        - updated_at: timestamp
    
    Building:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - company_id: foreign_key
        - name: string
        - address: text
        - created_at: timestamp
    
    Floor:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - building_id: foreign_key
        - name: string
        - floor_number: integer
        - created_at: timestamp
    
    Zone:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - floor_id: foreign_key
        - name: string
        - zone_type: enum
        - created_at: timestamp
    
    Equipment:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - zone_id: foreign_key
        - name: string
        - equipment_id: string
        - type: enum
        - status: enum [running, degraded, down]
        - photo_url: string
        - floor_map_x: float
        - floor_map_y: float
        - created_at: timestamp
        - updated_at: timestamp
    
    Module:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - equipment_id: foreign_key
        - name: string
        - module_id: string
        - status: enum [running, degraded, down]
        - created_at: timestamp
    
    Component:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - module_id: foreign_key
        - name: string
        - component_id: string
        - created_at: timestamp
    
    User:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - email: string
        - name: string
        - role: enum [admin, supervisor, technician, operator]
        - company_id: foreign_key
        - active: boolean
        - created_at: timestamp
    
    DowntimeEvent:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - equipment_id: foreign_key
        - module_id: foreign_key nullable
        - reported_by: foreign_key
        - acknowledged_by: foreign_key nullable
        - resolved_by: foreign_key nullable
        - severity: enum [critical, non_critical]
        - status: enum [reported, acknowledged, in_repair, resolved]
        - description: text
        - photo_url: string nullable
        - reported_at: timestamp
        - acknowledged_at: timestamp nullable
        - resolved_at: timestamp nullable
    
    WorkLog:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - downtime_event_id: foreign_key
        - technician_id: foreign_key
        - description: text
        - time_spent_minutes: integer
        - created_at: timestamp
    
    Part:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - name: string
        - part_number: string
        - cost: decimal
        - company_id: foreign_key
    
    PartsUsed:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - work_log_id: foreign_key
        - part_id: foreign_key
        - quantity: integer
        - cost_at_time: decimal
    
    FloorMap:
      fields:
        - id: uuid
        - floor_id: foreign_key
        - image_url: string
        - uploaded_by: foreign_key
        - created_at: timestamp

implementation:
  phase1_mvp:
    duration: 4-6 weeks
    features:
      - core_downtime_tracking
      - basic_dashboard
      - mobile_reporting
      - email_notifications
      - simple_user_management
    
  phase2_visualization:
    duration: 2-3 weeks
    features:
      - floor_map_drag_drop
      - equipment_photos
      - zone_management
      - teams_integration
    
  phase3_analytics:
    duration: 2 weeks
    features:
      - executive_reports
      - cost_tracking
      - mttr_mtbf_metrics
    
  phase4_integration:
    duration: 2 weeks
    features:
      - microsoft_sso
      - advanced_notifications

technical:
  wifi: reliable_everywhere
  devices: [phones, tablets, computers]
  camera_access: enabled_for_operators
  offline_support: not_required
  
  performance:
    page_load: <3_seconds
    real_time_updates: websocket_or_sse
    concurrent_users: 50+

success_criteria:
  - operators_can_report_under_30_seconds
  - technicians_acknowledge_within_15_minutes
  - full_audit_trail_for_all_events
  - real_time_dashboard_accuracy
  - multi_location_support_working
  - report_generation_under_5_seconds

Sent by Joy on behalf of Jason Hansen
